characters.name: Claire Abbott
characters.description: Claire AbbottBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanAliveUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1General InformationOccupationFenceActorRekha SharmaImages Claire Abbottis a fence who did business withthe Dodger. She was later arrested byMcKenna Hall.[1] When Claire was preparing to buy the stolen Sherwood Ruby fromthe Dodger, the sale was interrupted by the Police and a shooting happened. Claire tried to escape but DetectiveMcKenna Hallbumped into her and arrested her.[1]

characters.name: Liv Aberdine
characters.description: Liv AberdineBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanAliveUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1General InformationOccupationEmployee ofEndeavor Car Rental(formeerly)AffiliationEndeavor Car Rental(formerly)FamilyJasper Winters(father; deceased)Unnamed(mother)Unnamed(grandmother; deceased)Unnamed(cousin)ActorLucy GriffithsImages Liv Aberdineis an employee ofEndeavor Car Rental. She is also the daughter of the lateJasper Winters, and anunnamed woman, and the good friend of the lateTalia. Liv was targeted by a demon known asFurcifer, which ledJohn Constantineto send him toHellin order to keep her safe. Liv was born toJasper Wintersand anunnamed woman, she grew up believing that her father died before she was born, unaware that he was still alive and that he kept his distance in order to protect her. Jasper had secretly watched Liv as she grew up, even taking pictures of her from afar sometimes.[1]

characters.name: Abraham
characters.description: AbrahamBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanUnknownUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1General InformationOccupationSlave(formerly)ActorAlex BarimaImages Abrahamis a former slave toDaniel Collins. Abraham was chained up in a barn ofDaniel Collins'plantationas his slave, when he metJefferson Jackson. Abraham commented on the irony of Jax being named after two famous slave owners. He and his fellow slaves were soon rescued byAmaya Jiwe, who helped to convinceMaryand the rest of them to escape, rather than stay. Allowing the others to escape, Abraham aided Jefferson to steal the Confederates' battle plans from a hidden location in the Collins Plantation. The group then traveled toUlysses S. Grant's camp, where they were welcomed with open arms.[1]

characters.name: Cameron Abrams
characters.description: Cameron AbramsBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanAliveUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1General InformationOccupationMercenary arsonistActorPaul KularImages Cameron Abramsis a member ofJon Cortez's arson crew. Abrams was a member ofJon Cortez's mercenary arson crew. They set up another job atStarling Palladium, but were interrupted halfway through byRene RamirezandDinah Drake. They fought them off and were able to finish the job, only for the fire to quickly be put out by theGreen Arrow, and Abrams knocked unconscious.[1]

characters.name: Accelerated Man
characters.description: "Accelerated Man"Biological InformationSpeciesStatusMeta-humanDeceasedUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-19General InformationOccupationOverseer ofCollectorsAffiliationCollectorsAlter egoAccelerated ManActorSean PoagueImages "Accelerated Man" (died December 9, 2019[1]), was a speedster native toEarth-19, and was an overseer of the law-enforcingCollector AgencyofEarth-19, formerly includingCynthia/Gypsy. AfterGypsytracked down a breacher onEarth-2, she returned toCentral City (Earth-19), confirming to Accelerated Man that she'd caught her, handing him her photos before he sped away.[2]

characters.name: Ace (Royal Flush Gang)
characters.description: "Ace"Biological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanAliveUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1General InformationOccupationBank robber(incarcerated)AffiliationRoyal Flush GangAlter egoAceActorUnknownImages "Ace" is a member of the second iteration of theRoyal Flush Gang. Ace, along with other members of theRoyal Flush Gang, evaded capture by police for an armed robbery inKeystone Cityusing keen strategy and motorcycles. InCentral City, the gang initially managed to evadeThe Flashas well by splitting up, but using a strategy proposed byHarrison Wells, the speedster quickly caught them by creating detours and stripped them of the keys for their motorbikes, leaving them for the police to arrest.[1]

characters.name: Emiko Adachi
characters.description: Emiko AdachiCivilianGreen ArrowBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanAliveUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1Current universeEarth-PrimeGeneral InformationOccupationOriginal multiverseField leader of theNinth Circle(formerly)Vigilante(formerly)AffiliationOriginal multiverseNinth Circle(formerly)Team Arrow(in secret; façade; formerly)Dante(formerly)FamilyRobert Queen(father; deceased)Kazumi Adachi(mother; deceased)Moira Queen(step-mother)Oliver Queen(paternal half-brother; deceased)Thea Queen(adoptive sister)William Clayton(nephew)Mia Queen(niece)Alter egoGreen Arrow(original multiverse)ActorSea ShimookaMiya Cech(young)Images  Emiko Adachi(born 1989),[1]also known asEmiko Queen, is the daughter of the lateRobert Queenand the lateKazumi Adachi, the younger paternal half-sister of the lateOliver Queen, the adoptive sister ofThea Queen, and the paternal aunt ofWilliam ClaytonandMia Queen. She was the former field leader of the terrorist organization theNinth Circleand a vigilante archer who became the thirdGreen Arrow, taking up Oliver's mantle after his incarceration with aim of getting justice for Kazumi's murder.

characters.name: Cecil Adams
characters.description: Cecil AdamsBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanDeceasedUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1General InformationOccupationDrug lord(formerly)Alter egoCount VertigoThe Count(formerly)ActorSeth GabelImages Cecil Adams[1](October 31, 1981[2]- November 20, 2013), self-styledCount Vertigoand formerly known asThe Count, was the dealer and creator of a drug calledVertigo. He received his original nickname because his first customers, or "victims", were left with a mark by the injection of the drug on their neck, shaped like a vampire's bite. Cecil was killed byOliver Queenas the drug dealer tried to murderFelicity Smoak.Werner Zytlewould later take up his mantle under the name "Vertigo". Born on October 31, 1981 as Cecil Adams, the man who would one day be known as Count Vertigo entrenched himself in the underworld ofStarling City. To perfect his prize project, theVertigo (drug), Cecil kidnapped at least 56 people, mostly prostitutes and vagrants, before injecting the experimental drug in them with his signature double-needle syringe. The corpses would be found with a double puncture marks on their neck. Cecil was given the nickname "The Count" in reference to the fictional vampire CountDracula(ironically suiting theHalloweenseason).[3] Cecil was psychopathic, sadistic, ruthless, unreasonable, who took great pleasure in seeing individuals suffer, but after he was injected by his own drugVertigobythe Arrow, he became a shell of his former-self. However, when he returned as "Count Vertigo", his personality was restored.
characters.personality_section: Cecil was psychopathic, sadistic, ruthless, unreasonable, who took great pleasure in seeing individuals suffer, but after he was injected by his own drugVertigobythe Arrow, he became a shell of his former-self. However, when he returned as "Count Vertigo", his personality was restored.

characters.name: Ruvé Adams
characters.description: Ruvé AdamsBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanDeceasedUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1Current universeEarth-PrimeGeneral InformationOccupationMayor ofStar City(formerly)AffiliationH.I.V.E.(in secret; formerly)Star City(formerly)FamilyDamien Darhk(husband; deceased)Nora Darhk(daughter)Ray Palmer(son-in-law)ActorJanet KidderImages Ray Palmer(son-in-law) Ruvé Adams[1](died May 2016), also known asRuvé Darhk, was the mayor ofStar Cityand secretly a leading figure of the terrorist organizationH.I.V.E.. Ruvé was also the wife of the lateDamien Darhkand the mother ofNora Darhk. She was killed byLonnie Machinin his vendetta against Damien. Much like her husband,Damien Darhk, Ruvé was cold, cruel, smug, and ruthless. However, she was also intelligent, manipulative, and unlike Damien, very calm, patient, and levelheaded, rarely losing her composure. Ruvé strongly believed inH.I.V.E.'s goal of "a new beginning" and with her charismatic nature, ensured many others' loyalty to this cause. While running for mayor ofStar City, she maintained a graceful demeanor of a charitable politician to mask her deceitful, often sociopathic nature. Ruvé couldn't care less about the consequences of her, Damien, and H.I.V.E.'s actions on innocent individuals, having no regard for anyone other than herself and her family; for example, Ruvé ordered theDemolition Teamto destroy an entire building to kill all the other occupants and portray herself as a sympathetic survivor in order to win the mayoral election and was fully supportive of H.I.V.E.'s inhumaneNazi-esque experiments on their followers, such as testing gas chambers and suggestion pills. Even with her allies, Ruvé was not above patronizing or even disposing of them if she felt they weren't pulling their weight or if it was simply beneficial to H.I.V.E.'s endgame. Ambitious to the point of being immoral and unethical, Ruvé was always eager to use other's tragedies for her own ends; afterJohn Diggle's attack on her andEvelyn Sharp's attempted murder of her chief of staff,Alex Davis, in the wake ofLaurel Lance's death, Ruvé took advantage of this by issuing an arrest warrant forTeam Arrow. She had the audacity to dedicate her actions to Laurel's memory, essentially flaunting her murder at Damien's hands. Ruvé even silently mocked Evelyn when the latter aimed to kill the former to avenge her dead parents, expressing no sympathy for the teenager who was orphaned because of H.I.V.E., only caring about tarnishing Black Canary's legacy. Ruvé had a very low opinion of Team Arrow, despising them for trying to get in the way ofGenesis; compared to her husband, Ruvé felt she owed nothing to Green Arrow after he saved her and her daughter,Nora Darhk, fromLonnie Machinand even criticized Damien for sparing the vigilante archer's life because of this instead of killing him when he had the chance. Ruvé also immediately ordered for Green Arrow's arrest when he talked down Evelyn from killing her and tried to drag Black Cana

characters.description: Ruvé AdamsBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanDeceasedUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1Current universeEarth-PrimeGeneral InformationOccupationMayor ofStar City(formerly)AffiliationH.I.V.E.(in secret; formerly)Star City(formerly)FamilyDamien Darhk(husband; deceased)Nora Darhk(daughter)Ray Palmer(son-in-law)ActorJanet KidderImages Ray Palmer(son-in-law) Ruvé Adams[1](died May 2016), also known asRuvé Darhk, was the mayor ofStar Cityand secretly a leading figure of the terrorist organizationH.I.V.E.. Ruvé was also the wife of the lateDamien Darhkand the mother ofNora Darhk. She was killed byLonnie Machinin his vendetta against Damien. Much like her husband,Damien Darhk, Ruvé was cold, cruel, smug, and ruthless. However, she was also intelligent, manipulative, and unlike Damien, very calm, patient, and levelheaded, rarely losing her composure. Ruvé strongly believed inH.I.V.E.'s goal of "a new beginning" and with her charismatic nature, ensured many others' loyalty to this cause. While running for mayor ofStar City, she maintained a graceful demeanor of a charitable politician to mask her deceitful, often sociopathic nature. Ruvé couldn't care less about the consequences of her, Damien, and H.I.V.E.'s actions on innocent individuals, having no regard for anyone other than herself and her family; for example, Ruvé ordered theDemolition Teamto destroy an entire building to kill all the other occupants and portray herself as a sympathetic survivor in order to win the mayoral election and was fully supportive of H.I.V.E.'s inhumaneNazi-esque experiments on their followers, such as testing gas chambers and suggestion pills. Even with her allies, Ruvé was not above patronizing or even disposing of them if she felt they weren't pulling their weight or if it was simply beneficial to H.I.V.E.'s endgame. Ambitious to the point of being immoral and unethical, Ruvé was always eager to use other's tragedies for her own ends; afterJohn Diggle's attack on her andEvelyn Sharp's attempted murder of her chief of staff,Alex Davis, in the wake ofLaurel Lance's death, Ruvé took advantage of this by issuing an arrest warrant forTeam Arrow. She had the audacity to dedicate her actions to Laurel's memory, essentially flaunting her murder at Damien's hands. Ruvé even silently mocked Evelyn when the latter aimed to kill the former to avenge her dead parents, expressing no sympathy for the teenager who was orphaned because of H.I.V.E., only caring about tarnishing Black Canary's legacy. Ruvé had a very low opinion of Team Arrow, despising them for trying to get in the way ofGenesis; compared to her husband, Ruvé felt she owed nothing to Green Arrow after he saved her and her daughter,Nora Darhk, fromLonnie Machinand even criticized Damien for sparing the vigilante archer's life because of this instead of killing him when he had the chance. Ruvé also immediately ordered for Green Arrow's arrest when he talked down Evelyn from killing her and tried to drag Black Cana

characters.name: Addie
characters.description: AddieBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanAliveUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1General InformationOccupationPolice detectiveAffiliationCentral City Police DepartmentActorBailey CornealImages DetectiveAddieis a police detective of theCentral City Police Department. WhenBarry Allenreturned to work following being acquitted of murderingClifford DeVoe, Addie directed Barry to CaptainDavid Singh's office.[1]

characters.name: Adele
characters.description: AdeleBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanAliveUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-1Current universeEarth-PrimeGeneral InformationOccupationOriginal multiverseMusicianNew multiverseMusicianSource Adeleis a well-known musician.[1][2] Sometime in 2015, Adele released the song "Hello", which according toCisco Ramonis quite emotional.[1]

characters.name: Jerome Adison
characters.description: Jerome AdisonBiological InformationSpeciesStatusHumanAliveUniverse InformationHome universeEarth-TUD5General InformationOccupationStudentSource Jerome Adison(born c. 2001-2002)[1]is a student atGarfield High School. Jerome was born around 2001 to 2002. He attendedGarfield High School, from which he was suspended for some time. He was being monitored by Vice PrincipalKara Fowdyas part of her job as a spotter for theA.S.A.[1]
